title: Deck Stage Compression
summary: Bounded non-audit deck sections with internal scroll, stable scrollbars, and snap points while preserving the All deck as the full expandable audit view.
proof: Added global bounded-stage rules for normal deck sections so Library, Worlds, History, Control, and Command no longer add unlimited page height.
Kept the All deck unbounded for standalone audit, export, and full-repository review workflows.
Updated README, cache markers, snapshot generation, and regression floors so the standalone dashboard records the scroll-reduction unlock.
